parameters.prompt: Photorealistic standalone pressure-frame rib for a compact spacecraft cockpit, 4.7 m wide, 2.45 m high, 0.42 m long. Rounded rectangular structural ring with open walk-through center at least 1.4 m wide and 2.2 m high, curved shoulders, layered titanium/carbon armor, cable conduits, vents, service panels, integrated linear lights, fasteners and edge bevels. Continuous manufacturable hard surface, dark graphite and gunmetal, restrained safety-orange latches. No room, furniture, seat, console, window, text, logos, labels, people, floating parts, background or stand.

art_review.rejection_reason: the generated center is sealed, so it cannot own a portal or structural ring
art_review.integration_rejection_reason: repeated placement left large rounded corner voids and made the cockpit read as tiled pressure pods rather than one immersive room
required_cleanup: bake the glTF import basis before dimensional normalization
treat the result only as a repeated architectural liner panel
voxel-union fragmented render topology before bounded LOD derivation
preserve authored door, aisle and pressure-boundary geometry outside the generated source
art_review.runtime_material_policy: geometry uses sanitized authored materials; generated PBR textures remain source-only
